entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for susceptibility to the shoot fly.

entities.name: ATHERIGONA SOCCATA
entities.description: The sorghum shoot fly, a pest that affects sorghum seedlings.

entities.name: SEEDLING AGE
entities.description: The age of the sorghum plant, which influences susceptibility to the shoot fly.

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE WETNESS
entities.description: Moisture accumulation on the central shoot leaf, influencing larval movement.

entities.name: CENTRAL LEAF
entities.description: The specific leaf that serves as the path for newly hatched larvae.

entities.name: LARVA
entities.description: The larval stage of the sorghum shoot fly.

entities.name: CSH 1
entities.description: A susceptible sorghum genotype characterized by high leaf surface wetness.

entities.name: IS 2146
entities.description: A resistant sorghum genotype characterized by lower leaf surface wetness.

entities.name: DEADHEARTS
entities.description: The damage symptom produced by larvae in sorghum seedlings.

entities.name: GLOSSY LEAF TRAIT
entities.description: A morphological characteristic used as a parameter for resistance.

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: A morphological characteristic used as a parameter for resistance.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to withstand attack by the shoot fly.
